stripe.name: stripe
stripe.description: Stripe billing data sync with webhook handling
stripe.author: nself

cliCommands.name: sync
cliCommands.description: Sync all Stripe data to database

cliCommands.name: reconcile
cliCommands.description: Re-sync recent data to catch gaps from missed webhooks

apiEndpoints.description: Full status with account info and stats

envVars.name: STRIPE_API_KEYS
envVars.description: Comma-separated API keys for multi-account sync

envVars.name: STRIPE_ACCOUNT_ID
envVars.description: Account label for single-account mode (default: primary)
